title: Lizzie Borden inquest
policy_summary:
Profile: Investigative Journalism Standard.
Under this profile, we treat a claim as publication-ready when:
  • For SEF: at least 2 distinct sources linked to support, min confidence 0.7; At least two independent sources required for established facts
  • All claims have a type (SAC/SEF/INFERENCE/UNKNOWN)
  • All tensions are addressed (no OPEN or DISPUTED blocking publication)
  • Compound claims are at least partially_decomposed
  • No tension is in a blocking status for Vault: OPEN, DISPUTED
  • Tensions in INTRACTABLE, DEFERRED, ESCALATED have justification recorded
